findings.description: Temperature/top_p input validation has defensive guards (Number.parseFloat + Math.min/Math.max clamp + Number.isNaN check) so NaN/out-of-range input does NOT crash. However, invalid input (e.g., 'abc') silently converts to undefined with zero user feedback.

code_reference.input_path: TextField(type=number, min=0, max=2, step=0.1) → setTemperature(str) → handleSave
critical_lines: line 69: const temp = temperature() !== '' ? Math.min(2, Math.max(0, Number.parseFloat(temperature()))) : undefined
line 76: temperature: temp !== undefined && !Number.isNaN(temp) ? temp : undefined

findings.impact: No crash. Silent data loss for comma-decimal input (e.g., '0,5' → 0). Save button only disabled when !name(), not when temperature is invalid.
findings.remediation: Add explicit input validation with user feedback (toast or inline error). Validate temperature/topP before allowing save.

findings.description: Delete works via filtered re-save (no dedicated delete IPC handler). handleConfirmDelete is async (fixed in commit 9e953e7be). The saveCustomAgents function has try/catch with rollback on IPC failure.

code_reference.delete_path: handleDeleteAgent (line 128) → setConfirmDelete → handleConfirmDelete (line 132) → saveCustomAgents(customAgents().filter(...)) → a.setCustomAgents(agents) → ipcRenderer.invoke('set-desktop-custom-agents') → ipcMain.handle → store.set('agents', validated)
critical_lines: line 132: const handleConfirmDelete = async () => { await saveCustomAgents(customAgents().filter((a) => a.id !== agent.id)) }
line 81-97: saveCustomAgents() — optimistic update + try/catch rollback

findings.impact: Delete IS persisted. The only risk is if saveCustomAgents() fails silently (IPC bridge unavailable) — rollback restores UI state and shows error toast.
findings.remediation: Consider adding a dedicated delete IPC handler for atomicity. Add a loading/saving indicator during delete persistence.

findings.description: saveCustomAgents captures 'const prev = customAgents()' at call time, then does optimistic update + async IPC. Two rapid saves can race: if IPC1 (earlier save) fails AFTER IPC2 (later save) succeeds, the rollback setCustomAgents(prev) reverts to state that predates IPC2, causing DATA LOSS.

code_reference.race_scenario: T1: saveCustomAgents([a]) → prev=[], IPC1 starts. T2: saveCustomAgents([a,b]) → prev=[a], IPC2 starts. IPC1 fails late: rollback to prev=[], UNDOING IPC2's [a,b]
critical_lines: line 82: const prev = customAgents()  // captures at call time, not at rollback time
line 88: await a.setCustomAgents(agents)  // no debounce, no queue
line 91: setCustomAgents(prev)  // rollback may undo concurrent changes

findings.impact: Data loss under rapid save. No debounce, throttle, or isSaving guard on save button.
findings.remediation: Add functional updater to rollback (setCustomAgents(p => p === agents ? prev : p)) or use a save queue with deduplication. Add isSaving state to disable buttons during persistence.

findings.issue: No IPC-level delete handler for agents
findings.description: There is no dedicated 'delete-desktop-custom-agent' IPC handler. Delete is done by re-saving the entire agent list through set-desktop-custom-agents. This is fragile and inefficient for large agent lists.

code_reference.missing: No 'delete-desktop-custom-agent' handler — filtered re-save is the only path

findings.impact: No atomic delete operation. Other consumers cannot atomically delete an agent. High IPC payload (entire list) for a single deletion.
findings.remediation: Add ipcMain.handle('delete-desktop-custom-agent', (_, agentId) => ...) with atomic store.delete + list filtering.

findings.description: Number.parseFloat is locale-INsensitive (always uses '.' decimal separator). temperature().toString() on number also always uses '.'. Input type='number' HTML value property uses '.'. There is NO locale bug in the temperature/topP input path. Comma input ('0,5') returns NaN, silently converted to undefined.

code_reference.parse_path: TextField(type=number) → onChange={setTemperature(str)} → Number.parseFloat(str) → clamp → Number.isNaN guard
code_reference.critical: Number.parseFloat('0,5') = 0 (stops at comma) — locale-independent but causes precision loss

findings.impact: Low. No crash. Comma-decimal input produces incorrect value (0 instead of 0.5) with no user feedback.
findings.remediation: Add localized number parsing that either rejects or strips locale formatting, with user feedback.

findings.issue: FI-015: Agent select on empty state
findings.description: Empty state is safe. Initial state is createSignal([]). Load path uses (agents ?? []) nullish coalescing. List component has emptyMessage='No agents found'. No crash on null/undefined. However, there is NO error handling on the initial load path (the .then() has no .catch(), and no loading spinner is shown).
findings.impact: Safe for null/undefined data. But failed initial load silently shows empty list with no error indication.
findings.remediation: Add .catch() handler on initial load. Add loading spinner state. Display error toast if initial load fails.

findings.issue: handleSave has no try/catch — uncaught errors crash renderer
findings.description: The handleSave function has zero error handling. crypto.randomUUID() can throw in non-secure context. props.agent?.temperature?.toString() can throw if stored data is corrupted. props.onSave() can throw if IPC bridge is down. These all propagate as uncaught renderer exceptions.
findings.impact: Any exception in handleSave crashes the renderer. No recovery, no user feedback.
findings.remediation: Wrap handleSave in try/catch. Show error toast on failure. Ensure IPC errors are caught.

findings.issue: Server-side validation doesn't validate number fields
findings.description: isValidAgentDef only checks id (string), name (string), prompt (string) — it does NOT validate temperature or top_p types. A malformed agent with temperature='abc' (string instead of number | undefined) passes validation, gets stored, then crashes renderer when .toString() is called on it during edit.

validation: line 58: function isValidAgentDef(val: unknown): val is Record<string, unknown> {
line 61: return typeof obj.id === 'string' && typeof obj.name === 'string' && typeof obj.prompt === 'string'

findings.impact: Corrupted data can persist and crash renderer on next edit.
findings.remediation: Add stronger validation: check temperature is 'number' or 'undefined', top_p is 'number' or 'undefined', color is 'string' or 'undefined', etc.

findings.issue: ui: showToast uses hardcoded English strings for error messages
findings.description: The error toast in saveCustomAgents catch block uses hardcoded English strings: 'Error' and 'Failed to save custom agents — changes not persisted' instead of language.t() translation keys.
findings.code_reference: line 92-95: showToast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to save custom agents — changes not persisted' })
findings.impact: Non-localized error message for i18n users. Minor.
findings.remediation: Add translation keys for error messages and use language.t().

entry_points.name: handleSave
entry_points.description: Entry point for temperature/top_p validation logic and agent persistence trigger
entry_points.risk_reason: No try/catch, uncaught errors crash renderer

entry_points.name: saveCustomAgents
entry_points.description: Core persistence function — optimistic update + IPC call + rollback
entry_points.risk_reason: Race condition from prev capture at call time, no debounce/queue

entry_points.name: handleDeleteAgent / handleConfirmDelete
entry_points.description: Two-phase delete flow — set confirm state, then filtered re-save

entry_points.name: validateAndFilterAgents
entry_points.description: Server-side validation gateway for all agent writes
entry_points.risk_reason: Does not validate number fields (temperature, top_p), allowing corrupted data

entry_points.name: api() accessor (render bridge)
entry_points.description: Unsafe typed access to window.api bridge
entry_points.risk_reason: Unchecked type cast, optional methods only, no type safety for ElectronAPI

shared_file_fragments_needed.reason: Add debounce/queue to prevent save race (AGENT-003)
Add deleteCustomAgent method to ElectronAPI type
